slices_closed.name: decision_evidence_json_persistence_primitive
slices_closed.scope_narrowed_from_T4_1: T4.1 full scope (evaluator + lifecycle_events + payload wiring, ~4h) split into T4.1a (primitive, surgical) and T4.1b (full entry-path wiring, ~3-4h, follow-up slice). T4.1a is the persistence primitive per T4.0 Option E; T4.1b wires it into the entry event emission path.

critic_findings_integrated_inline.HIGH_method_attachment_false_premise: first draft used module-level _to_json + post-body DecisionEvidence.to_json = _to_json monkeypatch; comment asserted frozen dataclasses couldn't accept body methods (WRONG — frozen blocks instance mutation only). Fixed: moved to_json and from_json into class body, deleted false comment and type:ignore shields.
critic_findings_integrated_inline.MEDIUM_version_coverage_gaps: missing null-version test, missing boolean-True-version guard (True == 1 in Python!), missing __post_init__ ValueError propagation test. Fixed: added strict type(version) is int guard in from_json; added 4 tests (null version, boolean-True collision, sample_size=0 propagates, confidence_level=1.5 propagates).
critic_findings_integrated_inline.LOW_asdict_future_risk: asdict recursion is safe for current JSON-native primitives but brittle if future fields add Enum or nested dataclass. Addressed: docstring constraint note in to_json.
critic_findings_integrated_inline.LOW_literal_enforcement_deferred: evidence_type='banana' constructs today (no runtime Literal check). Pre-existing, out of T4.1a scope. Flagged for future slice.
